series_metadata.series_description: Forms are to be used to plan, budget, change and pay for capital projects completed by the Counties of Ohio. Form titles and number are as follows 1) County Capital Project Request for Payment DYS-2014. 2) Change Order DYS-2015. 3) Budget Plan DYS-2011. 4) Projected Cash FLow DYS-2013. 5) Schedule A DYS-2016. 6) Schedule B DYS-2017. Schedule C DYS-2012.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 4 years, then destroy provided audited by the Auditor of State and audit report is released, Paper: Wastepaper
